snippet.title: Katy Perry – The One That Got Away (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Katy Perry - The One That Got Away
Stream / Download "The One That Got Away": https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=Ahha3Cqe_fk

The One That Got Away Lyrics
Summer after high school, when we first met
We'd make out in your Mustang to Radiohead
And on my eighteenth birthday, we got matching tattoos
Used to steal your parents' liquor and climb to the roof
Talk about our future like we had a clue
Never planned that one day I'd be losing you
In another life, I would be your girl
We'd keep all our promises, be us against the world
In another life, I would make you stay
So I don't have to say you were the one that got away
The one that got away
I was June and you were my Johnny Cash
Never one without the other, we made a pact
Sometimes when I miss you, I put those records on, whoa
Someone said you had your tattoo removed
Saw you downtown, singing the blues
It's time to face the music, I'm no longer your muse
But in another life, I would be your girl
We'd keep all our promises, be us against the world
In another life, I would make you stay
So I don't have to say you were the one that got away
The one that got away
The one

The one that got away
All this money can't buy me a time machine, no
Can't replace you with a million rings, no
I should've told you what you meant to me, whoa
'Cause now I pay the price

In another life, I would make you stay

snippet.title: Ben&Ben - Autumn (Reimagined)
snippet.description:
Autumn (Reimagined)
Performed by Ben&Ben: Pat Lasaten, Agnes Reoma, Andrew De Pano, Keifer Cabugao, Jam Villanueva, Toni Muñoz, Poch Barretto, Paolo Benjamin, Miguel Benjamin, and Luke Sigua

Digital Operations Manager:  Enrique Capinianes
Digital Optimization Manager: Carl Sayat

Lyrics:
Autumn nights, I confine
Myself in galleries of us, just because I miss you
You don't have to remind me of the pains of circumstance
That demand our distance

And I'll be right here, in case you need to talk
I'm just a call away from you

Why can't we be together, baby?
Why does it take so long?
Why can't we be together, baby?
Should we keep holding on
Even when hope seems gone?

I long for you in the quiet after midnight
In my room
Movies of us, they replay inside my head
Over and over again

Just when healing could happen
I keep peeling the wounds open
To live in a world without you
Is to live in a world without meaning

Why can't we be together, baby?
Why does it take so long? (take so long)
Why can't we be together, baby?
Should we keep holding on
Even when hope seems gone?

In the morning light, when the pain subsides
I’ll face this truth with my own two eyes
From the fallen trees of your aftermath
I’ll find my peace, i will find my path

I will find my path

Autumn nights
Why does it take so long?
Autumn nights
Should we keep holding on and on and on

Why can't we be together, baby?
Why does it take so long?
Why can't we be together, baby?
Should we keep holding on
Even when hope seems gone?
Guess we’ll keep hoping on ahhh

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

snippet.title: ThrowBack Batang 90's 🔥 Siakol, Yano, Bamboo, Rivermaya, Parokya Ni Edgar, Eraserheads ~ Tunog Kalye
snippet.description:
🔥 Throwback Batang 90's – Tunog Kalye Classics
Balikan ang ginintuang panahon ng Pinoy Rock kasama ang mga alamat tulad ng Siakol, Yano, Bamboo, Rivermaya, Parokya ni Edgar, Eraserheads 🎸🔥

Ang playlist na ito ay magdadala sa’yo pabalik sa tunay na tunog ng Tunog Kalye—raw, totoo, at puno ng emosyon mula 90s hanggang early 2000s. Mula sa makabuluhang lyrics hanggang sa kantang sumasalamin sa buhay ng masa, lahat nandito na.

💿 Kung narinig mo na ang mga kantang ito sa cassette, CD, o radyo… congratulations, certified Batang 90’s ka na 😌

🎧 Vibe ng playlist:

Classic Pinoy Rock 90s
Tunog Kalye na may puso
Nostalgic Batang 90s hits
Mga kantang tumatak sa kabataan

👉 Pakinggan mo, ipikit ang mata, at hayaan mong ibalik ka ng musika sa panahong simple lang ang buhay—walang stress, walang problema, puro soundtrip lang 😌
#Batang90s #OPMRock #TunogKalye #PinoyRock #ThrowbackHits #90sMusic #OPMPlaylist #Eraserheads #Rivermaya #ParokyaNiEdgar #siakol #yano #bamboo
